titles.title: He Was Nailed To The Cross For Me

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: What a wonderful, wonderful Savior, Who would die on the cross for me! Freely shedding His precious life blood, That the sinner might be made free.

verse.name: v2
v3
verse.lines: Thus He left His heavenly glory To accomplish His Father's plan; He was born of the Virgin Mary, Took upon Him the form of man.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He was wounded for our transgressions, And He carried our sorrows, too; He's the Healer of every sickness, This He came to the world to do.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So He gave His life for others In redeeming this world from sin, And He's gone to prepare a mansion, That at last we may enter in.
